summary: Dashboard loading state displays core functionality with proper layout and navigation. Minor palette violations present but not blocking - pink CTA button and teal background conform to brand requirements, though some UI elements use neutral colors that deviate from strict diner palette.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white backgrounds in main content area instead of diner palette surfaces (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea)
Some text elements appear to use near-black colors instead of the specified primary ink color #1f1b18

actions: Consider updating dashboard background to use diner palette surfaces (cream #fff8ea for cards)
Verify text colors match the primary ink specification #1f1b18
Ensure consistency between authenticated and public surface visual treatments
